sources.gpuMultipliers: Cybenetics PSU Lab published methodology — GPU transient scaling factors by performance tier
sources.cpuMultiplier: Cybenetics PSU Lab published methodology — universal CPU transient factor
sources.atx31: Intel ATX 3.1 Design Guide (2024 revision) — transient excursion tolerance and hold-up time
sources.rtx5090Transient: Independent reviewer oscilloscope measurements (TechPowerUp, Igor's Lab, 2025) — observed 900W+ sub-1ms excursions on 575W TBP
sources.capacitorAging: Industry consensus — electrolytic capacitor derating ~5% annually after 3 years of continuous operation
